search.placeholder: Search games by name or ID...

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.importDesc: Import a previously exported favorites file.

gameCard.customExeHint: The exact .exe filename that will be detected when the process is running.

gameDetails.noExecutables: No executables defined for this game.

emptyState.noGamesFound: No games found matching your search.

shortcuts.hint: Tip: Press / or Ctrl+F to focus search · Escape to clear

remote.title: Mobile Remote
remote.description: Control Disactivity from your phone or tablet on the same Wi-Fi network. Open the address below in any browser, or use the Disactivity mobile app.
remote.connectHint: Open this address in a browser on your phone, or scan the QR code with the Disactivity mobile app. Devices must be on the same Wi-Fi network or Bluetooth PAN.

discovery.setupDesc: Trending and new releases are powered by FreeToGame. Add a RAWG API key in Advanced settings for higher-quality data.

apiKeys.title: API & Discovery
apiKeys.rawgKeyDesc: Powers trending and new release sections. Get a free key at rawg.io.
apiKeys.igdbDesc: Adds genres, release dates, ratings and descriptions to game details. Get credentials at dev.twitch.tv.
apiKeys.storageNote: Keys are stored locally in your config directory and never sent to any third-party server.

settings.title: Settings
settings.minimizeToTrayDesc: When you close the window, the app hides to the system tray instead of quitting.
settings.itemsPerPageDesc: How many games to show per page (10–200).
settings.autoStopDesc: Automatically stop simulated games after the timer expires.
settings.autoStopMinutesDesc: How many minutes before the game simulation stops automatically (1–480).
settings.idleStopDesc: Stop all running games automatically when your system has been idle (no keyboard/mouse input).
settings.idleStopMinutesDesc: Minutes of system inactivity before games are stopped (5–480).
settings.mediaWatcherDesc: Automatically set Discord status to what's playing in Spotify, TIDAL, or YouTube Music.
settings.ideWatcherDesc: Show your current file and project in Discord when VS Code or JetBrains IDEs are open.
settings.mediaClientIdDesc: Client ID of your Discord application used to display music status.
settings.ideClientIdDesc: Client ID of your Discord application used to display IDE activity.
settings.scheduleWatcherDesc: Automatically switch Discord presence profiles on a time-based schedule.

schedules.title: Scheduled Profiles
schedules.noProfiles: No profiles yet. Create one below.

customPresence.title: Custom Rich Presence
customPresence.description: Set a fully custom Discord status using any Discord Application ID. Create an app at discord.com/developers to get a Client ID.
customPresence.clientIdHint: The Application ID from your Discord Developer Portal app.

about.description: Simulate game activity by running invisible placeholder processes.
about.errorContributors: Could not load contributors from GitHub.

cannotStartGame.title: Cannot start game
cannotStartGame.noExecutables: This game has no executables defined.

updateAvailable.title: Update available!
updateAvailable.description: Version {{version}} is available. Click the update button to install it.

updateReady.title: Update ready
updateReady.description: Version {{version}} has been downloaded. Restart to apply.

updateInstalling.title: Installing update...
updateInstalling.description: Please wait while the update is being installed.

updateNoUpdates.title: No updates available
updateNoUpdates.description: You are running the latest version.
